lint.command: cd /Users/anas/Documents/Factory && bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh && bash ci/check-architecture.sh && bash ci/check-enterprise-policy.sh && bash ci/check-orchestrator-layer.sh && python3 scripts/check_flaky_tags.py --tests-root erp-domain/src/test/java --gate gate-fast && bash scripts/guard_openapi_contract_drift.sh

blockingIssues.description: `CompanyContextFilter` does not include `PUT /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/{id}/billing-plan` in `COMPANY_BOUND_CONTROL_ROUTES`, so root/platform superadmin billing-plan writes bypass target-tenant binding and can be evaluated against the caller scope instead of the requested tenant.

rejectedObservations.observation: The manifest does not provide a supported command for hot-deploying the rebuilt app JAR into the existing validation container, so the worker used an ad-hoc `docker cp ... && docker restart erp_domain_app` workaround for runtime proof.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous — the review did not establish a canonical command name or whether hot-reload, compose rebuild, or restart-only should be the supported runtime proof path, so this should not be applied automatically.
